---
title: "nitrix.augment.geometric"
generated: true
signature-hash: 7ad728cc02ffc799
description: "Spatial augmentation transforms (N-D, channels-last)."
listing:
  id: nitrix-augment-geometric-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-augment-geometric/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub — fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.augment.geometric`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC §6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Spatial augmentation transforms (N-D, channels-last).

- [`random_flip`](nitrix-augment-geometric/random_flip.qmd) -- independent per-axis Bernoulli reflection.
- [`random_crop`](nitrix-augment-geometric/random_crop.qmd) -- random-offset, fixed-size crop (a pure index
  slice).
- [`random_resized_crop`](nitrix-augment-geometric/random_resized_crop.qmd) -- a random sub-window resampled to a fixed
  output shape (the "zoom" augmentation), built on the
  [`spatial_transform`](nitrix-geometry.qmd) resampler.
- [`random_affine_matrix`](nitrix-augment-geometric/random_affine_matrix.qmd) -- a random affine, drawn in geometric
  parameters (rotation / scale / shear / translation) and assembled with
  [`params_to_affine_matrix`](nitrix-geometry.qmd).
- [`random_svf_displacement`](nitrix-augment-geometric/random_svf_displacement.qmd) -- a random smooth diffeomorphic
  displacement field, from a low-resolution stationary velocity field
  integrated by [`integrate_velocity_field`](nitrix-geometry.qmd).

The matrix / field generators return the *transform*; apply it with the
geometry warp primitives (an affine grid plus
[`spatial_transform`](nitrix-geometry.qmd)).  Coordinates and fields
follow the nitrix channels-last convention (`(*spatial, ndim)`).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `c` | feature channels (channels-last) |
| `*size` | a variadic group of axes (`size`) |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
| `d1` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `ndim` | number of spatial dimensions |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-augment-geometric-symbols}
:::
